title: Hausla
desc: Danish, a village boy with kabaddi dreams, faces adversity as he's unfairly removed from his team due to a dispute he didn't start. Despite family discord, his father stands by him. A new opportunity arises, showcasing Danish's talent. He's selected for the biggest game of his life, but tragedy strikes: his father passes away. Will Danish find the strength to play on, honoring his father's memory?

title: Meri Bebbe
desc: Based on true events, this poignant tale follows a young boy navigating life after losing his father and the unwavering efforts of his single mother to raise him against all odds.

title: Khwahishon Ki Car
desc: A newlywed longs to drive her dowry car, but is stalled by her husband's ego and her mother-in-law’s control. The Driver’s Seat is a quiet rebellion about agency, freedom, and the fight to take control—on the road and in life.

title: Jevlas Ka
desc: A gym freak eagerly awaits his cheat day, but family drama and an empty wallet stand in his way. As he navigates the chaos of Mumbai, will he find a way to satisfy his cravings, or will the city serve up an even bigger surprise? A fun-filled ride of food, family, and unexpected twists!

title: Laxmi
desc: Laxmi works as a maid at the house of a couple. She reaches home early only to find the owners of the house dead. She panics and tells her boyfriend about this. He thinks of a plan and tells her to rob the jewelry and cash from the house. Will she be able to do it? or is she falling for a trap?

title: It's A Match!
desc: Saurabh gets a match on a dating app and enlists his friend Shobhit’s help. But when Shobhit steals the spotlight—and the girl—things take a hilarious turn. Lies unravel, friendships are tested, and just when you think it's over… another match changes everything! A fun-filled tale of love, loyalty, and second chances

title: Nazariyaa
desc: Mihika, a 22 year old, fights with her dad yet again over going out late at night. She finds it very unreasonable of him to be so worried now that she’s 22. Waiting for her cab, she overhears her building’s supervisor talking on a phone call with his own daughter. She steps in and debates with him about how he shouldn’t be upset about her being out late at night but understands his perspective too in the process. She then goes back home to apologise and reconcile with her dad. The supervisor also understands his daughter’s situation better through this chance encounter.

title: Late Lateef
desc: Amir, who is in his mid-20s, is struggling with self-doubt and feeling trapped in his work routine. Unfortunately, his habit of being consistently late has caused him to fall out of favor with many people, including himself. This has created a vicious cycle that he has been unable to break free from despite his best efforts. However, having a supportive inner voice has been a great blessing for him as he tries to push through his struggles.

title: Kidnapped
desc: Love has many things hidden instore. What happens and Why does it happen? The secrets will be revealed in Kidnapped

title: Dimming Shadows
desc: The husband and wife both suffer from dementia, but with the help of a compassionate doctor and nurse, they make an effort to recover. Unfortunately, their attempts are unsuccessful, but their daughter finds solace in visualizing her parents as alive through virtual reality

title: Love, Bites
desc: Love, bites is a romantic drama where the story revolves around the lives of Karthik, an artist, and Meghna, scientist. Their sexual chemistry is obvious to everyone. Even to those who haven’t seen them together, since they like to flaunt the hickeys on their body. But something changes in their equation when the hickey becomes a bridge of memory that leads to an old sexual encounter Meghna had which Karthik finds out about. Will Meghna be able to help Karthik erase the marks of her past? Or will Karthik just to have to wake up to a realization that the past, even though it haunts, might not be real.

title: Kshan
desc: After a dinner-time discussion about mental health turns sour, Kamlesh (55) riles his daughter, Disha, a clinical psychologist, into storming off from the gathering. This incites Kamlesh into visiting three doors to his past that make him realise that he himself suffers from a mental health disorder. 'Kshan' is a recollection of a broken man's traumatic events and his realisation that drives him to seek help from his daughter after learning to let go of his ego.

title: Nathania
desc: One evening a couple, Kishan and Aparna reach home to witness what they have feared the most. This compels them to take the most critical decision of their life. Will they be able to live with the practical decision they make?

title: L'idiot
desc: L’Idiot tells the story of Rinku, a young, eccentric man who is captivated by French culture and hopelessly infatuated with Mona, a charismatic and free-spirited girl in his language class. His romantic fantasies and attempts to impress Mona take a comedic yet dark twist when he encounters a mysterious “thief,” who manipulates Rinku into a dubious scheme to win Mona’s affection. Rinku’s innocent longing for friendship and love leads him into an awkward and ultimately dangerous pursuit.

title: Mere Shohar Ki Begam
desc: Javed already married but still he wants second marriage. His first wife Rukhsar opposed him, he beats her and second day he gets his second wife Afsana at home. Because of jealousy, bitterness revenge game starts between both wives.

title: Killer By Chance
desc: The story follows an introverted person who works in an office and has a small circle of friends. He becomes enamored with his female boss, and upon returning home, receives a message from a massage company offering to send a beautiful girl to his place. Initially refusing the offer, he eventually accepts and prepares for her arrival. After a night of partying and sleeping over, a tragic event occurs, revealing the true nature of the introverted man.

title: Meera
desc: In this heartfelt story, a mother calls out to her daughter, only to be scolded by her husband. Her daughter, Meera, is a special child who cannot speak or hear, yet her mother sends her to school with hope. Despite the chaos and negativity around her, Meera remains blissfully unaware, finding beauty and positivity in everything. Her innocence and zest for life serve as a touching reminder of the purity within, even in a world filled with harsh words.

title: Kundli
desc: Kundli - is a film about values in life, which change some decisions against the will of the characters. It's about two meetings of these characters in a different time period and shows the changes that have occurred in their lives. Though along with time things have changed but there are something’s which are unforgettable at the back of the mind. Kundli is a film about small things that have remained though the times have changed.

title: Love Ishtory
desc: Chhavi belongs to a Brahmin family. She loves Aakash who is from a backward caste. Chhavi’s father is very disappointed with her daughter’s decision. Her father orders local inspector Dubey to catch Aakash to rough him up. But Chhavi’s elder brother Vicky appears in between. Vicky’s intention seems as he will blow Aakash’s head off. But there is a twist in the tale.

title: Late Night Taxi
desc: All the fears of a girl come to life after she travels in a late-night taxi she had booked. Does she reach home safely?

title: Kissss
desc: Joy and Ichcha elope from their respective houses as their parents are against them getting married. They take shelter at Joy's friend, Mihir's place. Mihir, who meets Ichcha for the first time is enchanted with her beauty. He is wondering why the families are against such a wonderful pair. Watch to find out the secret behind.

title: Ludo
desc: Two girls accidentally find out that in addition to the man they unknowingly share, they also share a lot of gifts from him. Including a game of Ludo which resembles their lives in some manner.

title: My Mothers Last Birthday Gift
desc: Confronting terminal lung cancer, a resolute mother sets out on a heartfelt journey to prepare her bright 7-year-old son with the emotional strength to cope with her impending absence, treasuring their remaining time together.

title: Marz
desc: Rajeev is afflicted by an unusual illness, confounding even his doctor, who's encountering such a case for the first time. Is it a supernatural phenomenon or something within the confines of their home? Unravel the mystery in this quirky 14-minute narrative.

title: Khalish
desc: Everyday violence in the household plagues the childhood of a girl. The helplessness and anxiety that arises from such an experience builds in her as she grows up. Her aversion to authority manifests itself in extreme outcomes later.

title: Naam Badal Dena
desc: A couple who is head over heels in love with each other with a love that's extraordinary yet relatable. The wife is told by everyone that she is too trusting of her husband. The wife makes a pact with her husband that if she ever acts like an ordinary suspecting wife he can change her name. The universe then puts her to the test on their wedding anniversary. The husband then makes her admit her true feelings as a wife and believe that possessiveness and jealousy in moderation are good.

title: Mestri
desc: The man is displaying the behaviour of a thug. He receives calls similar to those of Abbas Khan. Along his journey, he follows a couple in their mid-twenties. Initially, they appear in Christian attire, then in Gujarati attire. Later, they appear in Muslim attire. one day the thug catches both of them. And he confronts them in front of Abbas Khan. At that time, there was a confrontation between the thug and Abbas Khan regarding money. At that time, the real story was revealed.
